data.description: Skill that lives only under a non-default subdirectory on a non-default branch. Reachable only when BOTH ?path= and ?branch= are supplied with the repo override (PRD #621).

content.text: This prompt resolves ONLY when both ?path= and ?branch= are threaded into the repo override (PRD #621). Its presence proves the path/branch parameters were honored by the clone.
